steps.title: Find the boundary line equation
steps.content: Reading the graph, the boundary passes through $(0,1)$ and $(1,-3)$. The slope is $\frac{-3-1}{1-0}=-4$, giving $y=1-4x$.

steps.title: Pick the inequality direction from the shading
steps.content: Test the shaded point $(2,0)$ in $y>1-4x$: $0>1-8=-7$ ✓, and the dashed boundary confirms a strict inequality. So $$y>1-4x.$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
